description: Phase 013: remove Voyage + Cohere as cloud reranker providers. Closes the auto-routing footgun where setting VOYAGE_API_KEY or COHERE_API_KEY (commonly for embeddings purposes) would silently activate cloud reranking. 8 files modified + 1 test file deleted; 31/31 tests pass; ~340 net LOC removed. The local sidecar (Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B) is now the sole supported reranker, gated explicitly by SPECKIT_CROSS_ENCODER=true + RERANKER_LOCAL=true.
